---
title: '#1 Key to your success'
date: '2011-04-19T18:15:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Connor David Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3934261429786697509'
blogger_filename: '/2011/04/1-key-to-your-success.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Connor David Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

Connor the number one key to your success will be to learn how to Chill Out! <br />
<br />
Before you were born <a href="http://www.glorytogod.org/cgi-bin/gx.cgi/AppLogic+FTContentServer?pagename=FaithHighway/10000/6000/142GL/pastor">Pastor Randy Brodhagen of Glory to God Ministries</a> in Palm Springs, CA said to us that&nbsp; "this will be an intesnse child and your number one job as parents would be to teach you how to Chill Out!"<br />
<br />
I see now that I often ramp you up instead of down. It was as much a word for us as you. I must learn to better stay calm to help you stay calm. I apologize that I didn't learn that until after you were 6 years old. I love you son, btw CHILL OUT! ha ha
